rulings.Case Title: NARCISO S HILO III VS. FIRST FINANCIAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 24, 2012, line 9. Demurrer To Third Amended Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend as to first, second, third and fourth causes of action to allege in good faith. As to first and second causes of action, requisite specificity and to allege tender or exemption from tender requirement in third cause of action. And to allege injury in fact as to fourth cause of action. Sustain without leave to amend as to delcaratory and injunctive relief. No independent controversy alleged and injunctive relief not a cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVENECEL VILLANUEVA et al VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 24, 2012, line 10. Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank's Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint. Overrule, first cause of action re CCP 2923.5. Sustain second cause of action UCL. = (501/REQ)
